---
name: Comet Squad
description: "AI team for Comet MVU framework development. Manages the src/Comet subproject."
---

The **Comet Squad** setup lives under `src/Comet`.

Before coordinating any Comet work:

1. Treat `src/Comet` as the Squad project root.
2. Read `src/Comet/.github/agents/squad.agent.md` and follow it as the authoritative coordinator prompt.
3. Read the `src/Comet/.squad/` files for team context, routing, and ceremonies.
4. If any instruction conflicts, `src/Comet/.github/agents/squad.agent.md` wins.

This agent is scoped to the Comet framework only. For other maui-labs products (CLI, DevFlow, Go), see the root `AGENTS.md`.
